Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.util.statistics.IntervalRatioStatisticalTest

Packages that use IntervalRatioStatisticalTest
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Collection of statistical methods for determining certain properties of collected samples.

  • Uses of IntervalRatioStatisticalTest in org.moeaframework.util.statistics

    Subclasses of IntervalRatioStatisticalTest in org.moeaframework.util.statistics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OneWayANOVA
    The Single-Factor Between-Subjects Analysis of Variance determines if (at least) two out of K >= 2 populations have differing means.
    class 
    SingleSampleTTest
    The Single-Sample t test determines if the population's mean equals some specified value.
    class 
    TwoSampleTTest
    The Two-Sample t test determines if the mean of two populations are different.
